title: Hourglass Kids Hourglass Timer Hourglass Set Colorful Sand Clock Kitchen Timer Time Management Includes 1 Minute, 3, 5, 10, and 30 Minutes(5 Pieces)…
features: ⌛️[COLOR VARIATION] It is easy to distinguish between colored hourglasses in purple, green, orange, blue and pink.
⌛️[WIDE APPLICATION] can be applied to all time management activities, such as brushing teeth, learning, cooking and playing.
⌛️[DIFFERENT TIME] The hourglass contains the following running time: 1, 3, 5, 10, 30 minutes.
⌛️[DOUBLE LAYER PROTECTION] High quality and durable transparent plastic shell with glass tube inside, no risk of injury.
⌛️[EASY TO CARRY] It does not take up too much space and can be carried around when going out.
description: Product Description Develop a good habit of brushing your teeth for three minutes Develop a learning plan, complete learning activities on time and improve learning efficiency Cultivate a strong sense of time and develop good work and rest time A good helper for everyday times, can be used for kitchen, games, toothbrush timer, home office decoration. Using these colorful hourglass timers can help you live, study, and work better. Not only can it help you do things efficiently, but it can also teach your children the meaning of time.Besides, it is also very suitable for time cooking, games, exercise, experimentation and learning children.Their multiple colors can also make your home more unique, it is also a good gift for your kids and friends. 1 minute 3 minute 5 minute 10 minute 30 minute Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 677 4.5 out of 5 stars 677 4.5 out of 5 stars 677 4.5 out of 5 stars 677 — Price £10.78 £ 10 . 78 £10.26 £ 10 . 26 £10.26 £ 10 . 26 £9.06 £ 9 . 06 — no data color blue Green Orange Dark purple pink Children's hourglass timer is not a precise timer and may have a time deviation of ±10%When children under 3 years old use the timer, operate it under adult supervisionA small amount of sand in the hourglass can get stuck to the wall or get stuck, which is a normal phenomenon, just shake it slightly or put it in the sun for ventilation.
